framework_documents.title: PulseOne BiC Master Scorecard
framework_documents.description: Single source of truth for PulseOne's current performance metrics mapped against Service Leadership BiC benchmarks. Updated iteratively as new data is reconciled.

framework_documents.title: PulseOne BiC Action Register
framework_documents.description: Centralized, prioritized register of all 42 actionable recommendations extracted from BiC audit analyses. Includes 8 blocking ConnectWise data requests.

framework_documents.title: PulseOne BiC Standardized Documentation Plan
framework_documents.description: Master plan defining the 4-part standardized documentation architecture: Scorecard, Financial Model, Operational Audits, and Action Register.

financial_model.title: PulseOne Definitive P&L Analysis
financial_model.description: Definitive corrected P&L using confirmed CY 2025 Upwork data. All 12 freelancers classified. Reconciled to $0.30. This is the authoritative P&L version.

financial_model.title: PulseOne COGS Classification Analysis — Person by Person
financial_model.description: Complete person-by-person COGS vs. SG&A classification for all 38 PulseOne personnel. Confirmed by Paul Freeman April 17, 2026.

operational_audits.title: Software Resale & SaaS Rationalization
operational_audits.description: Six overlapping documents covering the -9.4% software resale margin failure. Should be consolidated into a single Audit_Software_Resale.md using the 9-section format.

operational_audits.title: Utilization & Billing Efficiency
operational_audits.description: Three overlapping documents covering technician utilization and billing leakage. Should be consolidated into a single Audit_Utilization_and_Billing.md using the 9-section format.

operational_audits.title: Profit Leakage & SG&A Analysis
operational_audits.description: Four overlapping documents covering profit leakage decomposition, departmental SG&A, and labor model reconciliation. Should be consolidated into a single Audit_Profitability_and_SGA.md using the 9-section format.

operational_audits.title: Client Profitability & Revenue Quality
operational_audits.description: Client concentration analysis and revenue quality assessment. Blocked on ConnectWise hours-by-client data for completion.

operational_audits.title: Revised Comprehensive BiC Audit Report
operational_audits.description: Comprehensive BiC audit incorporating expense tracking and partner compensation allocation. Supersedes the original BIC Audit Report (now archived).

operational_audits.title: Service Utilization (Incoming)
operational_audits.description: Template for the incoming service utilization analysis from a separate conversation. Will be populated when data is available.

operational_audits.title: Project Costing & Margin (Incoming)
operational_audits.description: Template for the incoming project margin and costing analysis. Will be populated when the updated project report is provided.

archived_documents.title: PulseOne Refined Analysis — Upwork Data
archived_documents.description: Intermediate version using estimated Upwork proportions.

archived_documents.title: PulseOne Final Reclassification and P&L
archived_documents.description: First complete reclassification with confirmed personnel classifications.

archived_documents.title: PulseOne Normalized P&L — Preliminary
archived_documents.description: Initial preliminary P&L rebuild before personnel classifications were confirmed.

archived_documents.title: PulseOne Software Optimization Plan — Final
archived_documents.description: Earlier software optimization plan. Superseded by the consolidated software resale audit cluster.

archived_documents.description: Original comprehensive BiC audit. Superseded by the Revised BIC Audit Report.
